title: PortSpoofPro
description: Imports threat intelligence from PortSpoofPro's active deception platform: attacker IPv4/IPv6 observables, indicators, sightings, threat actors, tools, attack patterns (techniques, behaviors, MITRE ATT&CK), session reports and their relationships.
short_description: High-fidelity threat intelligence from PortSpoofPro's active deception platform.
